_comment: JS mutation testing (Stryker). Run with: make mutation-js (or npx stryker run). Mutates the extracted UI logic under couchpotato/static/scripts/ui/, which the inline Alpine components delegate to and the vitest tests import (~96% mutation score). 'break' is null so it never fails CI — the nightly job is informational. Legacy mootools scripts (the deprecated /old UI) are intentionally out of scope.
